channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

- Ex-Trump adviser Bolton pleads guilty in classified documents case

- Trump's former national security adviser John Bolton pleads guilty in classified records case
- Trump critic John Bolton set to plead guilty in classified information case
- John Bolton pleads guilty mishandling classified documents: Ex-Trump advisor faces 5 yrs prison sentence, $2.25 mn fine

- Ex-NSA adviser John Bolton admits to improper handling of secret documents
- Ex-national security adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to illegally retaining classified information
